mood_templates.happy: upbeat, cheerful, major key, bright melody, positive vibes
mood_templates.sad: melancholic, emotional, minor key, reflective, slower tempo
mood_templates.energetic: high energy, driving rhythm, dynamic, powerful, fast-paced
mood_templates.calm: peaceful, meditative, atmospheric, soft textures, relaxation
mood_templates.dark: mysterious, ominous, tension, cinematic, deep bass

style_templates.rock: distorted electric guitar, acoustic drums, bass guitar
style_templates.lo-fi: dusty vinyl crackle, hip hop beat, rhodes piano

note: Mood templates are used directly in enhance(), style templates are for reference/future expansion.
